# Longevity performance coaching lab

A science-backed health and fitness coaching brand targeting men aged 40–60+ who are stuck in chronic dieting cycles, struggling with low testosterone, inflammation, and metabolic slowdown. The brand blends nutritional science, exercise physiology, hormone health, and behavioral psychology into a structured, empathetic, no-nonsense 90-day transformation methodology called 'Metabolic Priming.' The tone is authoritative yet approachable — like a knowledgeable coach who genuinely understands the frustrations of aging men trying to get lean and healthy again.

Source: https://longevity-performance-coaching-lab-83aacfa3.zappy5.app

---

Metabolic Priming System


# Longevity PerformanceCoaching Lab


### Science-Backed Health & Wellness Transformation for Men 40+ Who Are Done with Endless Dieting


Start Your 90-Day Reset

How It Works














## The Metabolic Priming Method


A science-backed 90-day blueprint to rebuild your engine, restore your hormones, and unlock sustainable fat loss.








### Phase 1: Reduce Inflammation


Eliminate ultra-processed foods, seed oils, and excess sugar. We rebuild your plate with nutrient-dense whole foods to calm systemic inflammation and improve gut health.


- Anti-inflammatory nutrition protocol

- Gut health restoration

- Energy & mental clarity rebound








### Phase 2: Restore Insulin Sensitivity


Reverse metabolic slowdown by strategically timing carbohydrates around training. We increase your body's ability to partition nutrients, not just restrict calories.


- Carb cycling & nutrient timing

- Blood sugar stabilization

- Stubborn belly fat targeting








### Phase 3: Build Metabolic Muscle


Progressive resistance training combined with optimized protein intake to rebuild lost muscle mass. More muscle means a higher resting metabolic rate.


- Age-adjusted strength programming

- Testosterone optimization

- 24/7 calorie burning engine








### Phase 4: Sustainable Fat Loss


Once your metabolic engine is primed, we enter a structured fat-loss phase without extreme restriction. You'll eat more food while losing body fat for the first time in years.


- High-satiety meal plans

- Weekly accountability coaching

- Lifetime maintenance strategy





Start Your 90-Day Transformation





























About the Lab



## Science-Backed Longevity Coaching for Men Over 40



At Longevity Performance Coaching Lab, we don't believe in endless dieting. We believe in rebuilding your body's engine. Our Metabolic Priming methodology blends nutritional science, exercise physiology, hormone health, and behavioral psychology into a structured 90-day transformation. Designed specifically for men aged 40–60+, we help you break free from chronic dieting cycles, low testosterone, inflammation, and metabolic slowdown.



The goal isn't to eat less forever. The goal is to make your body burn more. Through restoring calorie intake, improving insulin sensitivity, rebuilding muscle, and lowering inflammation, we create a sustainable path to lasting fat loss and renewed vitality. This is health and wellness redefined — a no-nonsense, empathetic approach for men ready to get lean and healthy again.



90
Day Protocol


7
Metabolic Pillars


40+
Age Focus



Start Your Transformation

Stop dieting harder. Start building a body that burns more for you. Your 90-day Metabolic Priming transformation starts with one conversation.

# Science-Backed Longevity Coaching


### Break the chronic dieting cycle. Rebuild your metabolism, restore your hormones, and reclaim your health with our 90-day Metabolic Priming methodology.


Start Your Transformation
Learn More










Our Methodology


## Metabolic Priming: A Structured Path to Body Transformation


A science-backed 90-day framework designed for men over 40 to rebuild metabolic health, restore hormone balance, and achieve sustainable fat loss without chronic dieting.











Phase 1

### Reduce Inflammation & Reset


The foundation of metabolic priming begins with a 2–4 week anti-inflammatory protocol. We systematically remove ultra-processed foods, seed oils, excess alcohol, and refined sugars while introducing nutrient-dense whole foods: quality proteins, fibrous vegetables, berries, potatoes, rice, oatmeal, olive oil, and avocados. This phase lowers systemic inflammation, improves gut health, and prepares your body to respond to training and nutrition interventions.


- Eliminate inflammatory triggers

- Restore gut integrity and digestion

- Stabilize blood glucose response

- Improve energy and mental clarity











Phase 2

### Rebuild Muscle & Restore Hormones


With inflammation under control, we shift focus to rebuilding the metabolic engine. This phase combines strategic resistance training, adequate protein intake, and recovery optimization to increase lean muscle mass, boost testosterone naturally, and improve insulin sensitivity. We address the root cause of metabolic slowdown—muscle loss and hormonal decline—rather than simply cutting more calories.


- Progressive strength programming

- Protein and nutrient timing strategies

- Sleep and stress management protocols

- Natural testosterone support











Phase 3

### Sustainable Fat Loss & Metabolic Flexibility


The final phase transitions you into a sustainable fat-loss period where your body is primed to burn stored fat efficiently. Unlike chronic dieting cycles that crash your metabolism, this phase leverages your newly rebuilt muscle, balanced hormones, and increased daily energy expenditure to create a manageable calorie deficit without hunger, fatigue, or rebound weight gain. You leave with a personalized maintenance blueprint for lifelong health and wellness.


- Strategic calorie cycling for fat loss

- Metabolic flexibility and carb tolerance

- Long-term maintenance planning

- Lifestyle integration and accountability


Start Your Transformation







Ready to break the cycle of chronic dieting and finally get results that last?

Apply for Coaching












Start Your Transformation

## Ready to Break the Cycle and Prime Your Metabolism?


Stop guessing, stop starving, and stop spinning your wheels. The Metabolic Priming Method is a structured 90-day system designed for men 40+ who are ready to rebuild their engine — not just restrict fuel. Let's build a body that burns more, feels younger, and performs at its peak.

Our Mission



# Redefining LongevityFor The Modern Man



### Science-backed health coaching that breaks the cycle of chronic dieting, rebuilds metabolic health, and restores vitality after 40.



Start Your Transformation
Explore The Methodology




























Our Story



## The Metabolic Awakening



Longevity Performance Coaching Lab was born from a deep frustration with the broken promises of the modern fitness industry. For decades, men over 40 have been fed the same tired advice: eat less, move more. But for the millions of men trapped in chronic dieting cycles, battling low testosterone, systemic inflammation, and a metabolism that seems to shut down overnight, that advice isn't just ineffective — it's destructive.



Our founder spent years in the trenches of nutritional science and exercise physiology, watching high-performing men slowly lose their edge. The problem wasn't a lack of willpower. It was a biological system that had been starved, stressed, and stripped of its engine. The solution required a fundamental shift from restriction to restoration — a concept we now call Metabolic Priming.



Instead of asking your body to survive on 1,500 calories, we teach it to burn 3,000. We don't just strip away fat; we rebuild the hormonal architecture, restore insulin sensitivity, and reignite the metabolic furnace that made you feel unstoppable in your 20s. This isn't a diet. It's a 90-day physiological recalibration designed specifically for the male body over 40.






Our Mission: To equip men over 40 with the science, structure, and support to reclaim their vitality, build a bulletproof metabolism, and become the strongest version of themselves — for life.


















## The Coaching Team


Science-backed guidance from experts who understand the unique challenges men face after 40. Our coaches blend nutritional science, exercise physiology, and behavioral psychology to deliver lasting body transformation in West Palm Beach.













### Marcus Thorne


Lead Performance Coach


With over 15 years in exercise physiology and hormone health, Marcus specializes in rebuilding metabolic engines for men over 40. He cuts through the noise with a no-nonsense, science-backed approach to sustainable fat loss and muscle gain.











### Dr. Julian Cross


Nutritional Therapist


Julian bridges the gap between clinical nutrition and real-world eating. He designs the Metabolic Priming nutrition protocols that reduce inflammation, restore insulin sensitivity, and finally break the cycle of chronic dieting.











### Eli Reed


Behavioral Psychologist


Eli tackles the mental side of transformation. He helps men rewire decades of dieting frustration, build sustainable habits, and develop the resilience needed to make health and wellness a permanent lifestyle, not just a 90-day sprint.
















Unlock your body's full potential through science-backed performance coaching and longevity protocols.

## Privacy Policy

Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy

Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/11/2026



Longevity performance coaching lab ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Longevity performance coaching lab

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

- Home

Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 11, 2026



Longevity performance coaching lab is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Longevity performance coaching lab

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 11, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Longevity performance coaching lab

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Health & Wellness provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Longevity performance coaching lab provides Health & Wellness through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Longevity performance coaching lab. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Longevity performance coaching lab

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
